en.title: For Starlink Gen 3 Router & Power Supply Mounting Kit
en.description_html:
Starlink Gen 3 Router and Power Supply Mount, made from high-quality impact-resistant ABS, provides a stable and secure mount for your Starlink Gen 3 WiFi router

Features:

  • Starlink Router Wall Mount - Starlink Gen 3 Router and Power Supply Mount enables a secure and firm mounting of your Gen 3 router for neat and clutter-free organization, elevating your Starlink setup whether it is in home office, warehouse, or RV

  • Enhanced Signal Performance - 2 in 1 mount allows stable fixation of both Starlink V3 router and power supply, reducing the risk of router movement and improving signal stability

  • Sturdy Material - Crafted with precision from high-quality virgin ABS material, the router mount offers greater impact resistance and protection for years to come

  • Easy Installation - Designed for easy setup with screws included, simply drill holes on the wall, secure the bracket with screws, insert power supply from the side, then thread the cable through the bracket, and fasten the router onto bracket

Specifications:

  • Overall Dimension(LxWxH): 7 1/16" x 5 1/2" x 3 9/16" (18 x 14 x 9 cm)

  • Fits Router Size(LxW): 6 11/16" x 3 3/8" (17 x 8.5 cm)

  • Compatibility: Starlink Standard Gen 3

  • Material: Virgin ABS

  • Net Weight: 0.33 Lb (0.15 kg)

Package Includes:

  • 1x Router and Power Supply Mount

  • 1x Hook-and-loop Fastener

  • 1 Set of Screws

  • 1x Manual

  • Package Content:

  • 1x Mast Adapter

  • 1x Mast

  • 1x Pivot Mount
